description: Style noteIn heaven for men by tous is a youth-oriented fragrance, true to which it features tattoo inspired art on its cylindrical flask. This perfume is an aromatic fougere with dominant tones of mandarin, pineapple, chili pepper, cardamom, violet leaves, carambola and patchouliQuantity: 100 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
